title: Web Scanner Tool Identification (User Agent Stacking)
description: Stacks user agents across all web traffic to identify automated scanning tools, attack frameworks, and bot traffic. Non-browser user agents generating high request volumes from a small set of source IPs indicate active reconnaissance or automated exploitation.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') | stats count as requests, distinctcount('Client IP') as source_ips, distinctcount('Response Code') as status_codes by 'User Agent' | sort -requests | where requests > 50 and source_ips < 5
